# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys
import heapq

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    idx = 0
    N = int(data[idx])
    idx += 1
    M = int(data[idx])
    idx += 1
    L = int(data[idx])
    idx += 1
    
    a = list(map(int, data[idx:idx+N]))
    idx += N
    b = list(map(int, data[idx:idx+M]))
    idx += M
    
    forbidden = set()
    for _ in range(L):
        c = int(data[idx]) - 1  # 0-based index
        idx += 1
        d = int(data[idx]) - 1
        idx += 1
        forbidden.add((c, d))
    
    # Get top K main dishes and side dishes
    K = 200  # A reasonable number to consider for top candidates
    
    # Get top K main dishes (highest prices)
    top_a = a[:K]
    # Get top K side dishes (highest prices)
    top_b = b[:K]
    
    max_price = 0
    
    # Check all combinations of top K main and side dishes
    for i in range(len(top_a)):
        for j in range(len(top_b)):
            if (i, j) not in forbidden:
                price = top_a[i] + top_b[j]
                if price > max_price:
                    max_price = price
    
    print(max_price)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
